name: negation
description: A knows which beliefs are false. Must communicate NOT X to B.
task_a: World state has 5 beliefs. Beliefs 2 and 4 are FALSE. Communicate to Agent B which beliefs are false so B can delete them. Write ANSWER.md with the 3 true beliefs when B confirms.
task_b: There are 5 beliefs in the world. Some are false. Agent A knows which ones. Based on A's messages, identify the false beliefs and write ANSWER.md listing ONLY the true beliefs (the ones A did NOT mark as false).
